title: Segment Results Analysis
finding: Adjusted operating profit decreased by 46.9% from 6350.0 in 2021 to 3375.0 in 2022
implication: This significant decline may indicate a challenging business environment or increased competition
suggested_viz: Bar chart comparing adjusted operating profit between 2021 and 2022

title: New Business Profit (EEV) Trends
finding: New business profit decreased by 56.0% from 4969.0 in 2021 to 2184.0 in 2022
implication: This decline may be a result of decreased demand or lower margins, and could impact future revenue
suggested_viz: Line chart showing new business profit from 2020 to 2022
